title: Selected Projects
subtitle: Real solutions for real businesses. Here's what we've built.

projects.title: Fintech Payment Dashboard
projects.shortDescription: A real-time M-Pesa payment tracker for Kenyan businesses with advanced analytics.

caseStudy.challenge: Nairobi Sacco, with over 50,000 active members, was struggling with manual transaction processing, delayed reconciliations, and limited member access to financial services. Their existing system could not handle the growing volume of daily transactions, leading to errors, delays, and member dissatisfaction. They needed a modern, scalable solution that would automate their payment tracking, provide real-time visibility into transactions, and integrate seamlessly with M-Pesa.
caseStudy.solution: We built a comprehensive fintech dashboard that processes transactions in real-time using WebSockets for instant updates. The platform integrates directly with M-Pesa's API, automatically pulling transaction data and reconciling it with member accounts. We implemented advanced analytics to provide insights into transaction patterns, fraud detection algorithms to identify suspicious activity, and a user-friendly interface that allows Sacco staff to monitor all transactions from a single view. The system also includes automated reporting, member self-service portals, and real-time alerts for unusual activity.
caseStudy.results: The platform now processes over 10,000 transactions daily with zero errors. Reconciliation time has been reduced from 3 days to under 2 hours, saving the Sacco 40+ hours of manual work weekly. Member engagement has increased by 45% with the introduction of self-service features, and fraud detection has improved by 90% through automated alerts. The Sacco has reported a 30% increase in operational efficiency and a 25% reduction in transaction-related complaints.
caseStudy.testimonial: Prestige Web Room transformed our payment tracking. We can now monitor thousands of transactions in real-time with complete confidence. The system has saved us countless hours and improved our members' experience significantly. I highly recommend their services to any financial institution looking to modernize their operations.

projects.title: Real Estate Property Portal
projects.shortDescription: A comprehensive property listing platform with CRM integration for real estate agents.

caseStudy.challenge: Prime Properties, one of Kenya's leading real estate agencies, was managing over 5,000 property listings and 1,000+ agents using a fragmented system of spreadsheets, emails, and multiple disconnected tools. This led to duplicate listings, lost leads, poor agent coordination, and a frustrating experience for clients searching for properties. They needed a unified platform that would centralize their operations, improve lead management, and provide a better experience for both agents and clients.
caseStudy.solution: We developed a comprehensive real estate management system that combines property listing management, advanced search capabilities, and full CRM integration. The platform features a powerful search engine with Elasticsearch for fast, accurate property discovery, a client portal for viewing and shortlisting properties, and a CRM for managing leads and client relationships. We also built an agent dashboard for tracking performance, managing listings, and communicating with clients. The system is fully mobile-responsive, ensuring agents can work from anywhere.
caseStudy.results: The platform now supports 5,000+ active property listings and 1,000+ agents across Kenya. Lead conversion has increased by 35%, and property listing time has been reduced by 60%. Agents can now manage their entire workflow from a single platform, and clients can search, view, and shortlist properties with ease. The system has generated over 50 million KES in property sales through the platform in its first year.
caseStudy.testimonial: Working with Prestige Web Room was a game-changer for our business. They delivered a platform that our agents love and our clients trust. The CRM integration alone has transformed how we manage leads and close deals.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform for Retail
projects.shortDescription: A scalable multi-vendor marketplace with inventory management and payment integration.

caseStudy.challenge: Prime Retail, a leading retail group in Kenya, wanted to launch a multi-vendor marketplace to bring together over 200 sellers in a single online platform. They needed a solution that could handle thousands of products, support multiple payment methods, provide real-time inventory tracking across all sellers, and offer a seamless checkout experience. Their existing infrastructure was not equipped to handle the complexity of a multi-vendor marketplace with real-time inventory synchronization and automated vendor commission calculations.
caseStudy.solution: We built a custom multi-vendor marketplace platform with integrated inventory management, automated vendor commission calculations, and a seamless checkout experience. The system features a robust product catalog, real-time inventory sync across all vendors, automated commission settlement, and a vendor dashboard for managing products, tracking sales, and accessing analytics. We integrated M-Pesa, Visa, and Mastercard payment gateways to support multiple payment options for customers. The platform also includes an admin dashboard for managing vendors, monitoring platform performance, and generating business insights.
caseStudy.results: The platform now supports 200+ sellers, processes over 5,000 orders monthly, and has generated over 50 million KES in sales in its first year. Vendor onboarding time has been reduced by 70%, and average order value has increased by 25%. The automated commission settlement system has saved 20+ hours of manual work weekly, and the platform has maintained 99.5% uptime with zero downtime during peak shopping periods.
caseStudy.testimonial: Prestige Web Room delivered a world-class e-commerce platform that exceeded all our expectations. The multi-vendor marketplace has transformed how we do business, and our sellers are thrilled with the new platform. This has been one of the best investments we've made.
